holdings.infoBox: SMRI is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 4.64%, Dell Technologies at 3.86%, Humana at 3.62%, Centene at 3.31%, and ON Semiconductor at 3.18%.

overview.description: The Bushido Capital US Equity ETF (SMRI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages an equally weighted portfolio of 30 to 50 US stocks believed to be undervalued but financially attractive. The funds stock selection involves a fundamental value approach. SMRI was launched on Sep 14, 2023 and is issued by Bushido.

data.title: The return of value investing ETFs
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani sits down with KraneShares chief investment officer Brendan Ahern and Sepio Capital co-CIO and managing director John Beatson to discuss the rise of value investing ETFs and the phil...
